    + VEDAPP +
    + +
    + + + + + + + + + + + +
    +
    + + +
    + + + +
    + +
    +
    +
    + + + +
    +
    + +
    +

    + VedaOils is one of the leaders in the manufacturing and production of natural essential oils and raw ingredients. + It has been in existence for more than 4+ making its remarkable mark in the industry. +

    + +

    Our varied array of products ranges from essential oils to carrier oils, natural butter to natural clays, and pigmented powder colors to floral waters. All these products are completely organic in nature devoid of any harmful and chemical-based additives.

    +

    Our Mission & Vision

    +

    VedaOils, founded in 2018, is a reputable and proficient manufacturer, supplier, exporter, and distributor of 100% pure and natural essential oils. The company is dedicated to supplying its consumers with high-quality goods at competitive prices.

    +

    To provide optimum benefits to the customers, we endeavor to preserve the natural ingredients of plant botany alive during the creation of our products.

    + + +

    Infrastructure

    +

    VedaOils has been devoted to a clean manufacturing infrastructure from its inception, with a focus on the development of pure essential oils and other natural products. Furthermore, the organization employs cutting-edge machinery and equipment to create high-quality formulae for a variety of products.

    +

    We follow Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP) standards and regulations in our manufacturing facility, which employs environmentally-friendly equipment to produce best-in-class products.

    +

    Lab Tested Products & Quality Control

    +

    Our research and development (R & D) team is actively creating new products based on essential oils, herbal extracts, cosmetic raw material, and fragrances oil while maintaining their authenticity and purity.

    +

    We have begun application-oriented research in the field of aromatic oils and essential oils. We are constantly inventing new formulas in order to satisfy our customers and match their ever-increasing demands.

    +

    Packaging

    +

    Our team carefully packs our high-quality organic oils and other natural products in protective packaging to ensure safe delivery. Depending on the quantity, each product is packaged in a variety of sizes of boxes, bottles, and containers.

    +

    In addition, all of our products are properly packed in sanitary circumstances. The Best part about our packaging is that it actively contributes to our products' overall credibility and physical features.

    +

    Certifications & Documentation

    +

    VedaOils is proud to say that it has received accreditation from the authorities in charge of enforcing specified standards. In addition, the organization's management has designed and implemented stringent measures and quality inspection processes to fulfill all of the mandated requirements for manufacturing, processing, and distributing a diverse variety of products globally. We deal with bulk orders, as well as private label products.

    +     + + Read More +
    + + + + +
    +
    +

    Popular searches:

    +
    +

    + Shop By Collection:- + + Essential Oils Collection + Carrier Oils Collection + Fragrance Oils + Flavour Oils + Body Butters + Herbal Powders + Herbal Liquid Extract + Baby Care + Skin Care + Hair Care + Essential Oils Blends + Spa Oils +

    + +

    + Shop By Concern:- + + Acne Care + Aging + Senstive & Redness + Dryness & Dehydration + Hyperpigmentation + Dry & Damaged Hair + Dandruff & Scalp Care + Frizz Control + Color Treated Hair + Hair Loss & Thinning +

    +

    + Shop By Ingredients:- + + Amla + Strawberry + Lavender + Avocado + Choclate + Cinnamon + Clove + Coconut + Cucumber + Garlic + Ginger + Hibiscus +

    +
    +
    +
    + + + +
    + +

    +

    + VedaOils is one of the leaders in the manufacturing and production of natural essential oils and raw ingredients. + It has been in existence for more than 4+ making its remarkable mark in the industry. +

    + +

    Our varied array of products ranges from essential oils to carrier oils, natural butter to natural clays, and pigmented powder colors to floral waters. All these products are completely organic in nature devoid of any harmful and chemical-based additives.

    +

    Our Mission & Vision

    +

    VedaOils, founded in 2018, is a reputable and proficient manufacturer, supplier, exporter, and distributor of 100% pure and natural essential oils. The company is dedicated to supplying its consumers with high-quality goods at competitive prices.

    +

    To provide optimum benefits to the customers, we endeavor to preserve the natural ingredients of plant botany alive during the creation of our products.

    + +

    Infrastructure

    +

    VedaOils has been devoted to a clean manufacturing infrastructure from its inception, with a focus on the development of pure essential oils and other natural products. Furthermore, the organization employs cutting-edge machinery and equipment to create high-quality formulae for a variety of products.

    +

    We follow Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP) standards and regulations in our manufacturing facility, which employs environmentally-friendly equipment to produce best-in-class products.

    +

    Lab Tested Products & Quality Control

    +

    Our research and development (R & D) team is actively creating new products based on essential oils, herbal extracts, cosmetic raw material, and fragrances oil while maintaining their authenticity and purity.

    +

    We have begun application-oriented research in the field of aromatic oils and essential oils. We are constantly inventing new formulas in order to satisfy our customers and match their ever-increasing demands.

    +

    Packaging

    +

    Our team carefully packs our high-quality organic oils and other natural products in protective packaging to ensure safe delivery. Depending on the quantity, each product is packaged in a variety of sizes of boxes, bottles, and containers.

    +

    In addition, all of our products are properly packed in sanitary circumstances. The Best part about our packaging is that it actively contributes to our products' overall credibility and physical features.

    +

    Certifications & Documentation

    +

    VedaOils is proud to say that it has received accreditation from the authorities in charge of enforcing specified standards. In addition, the organization's management has designed and implemented stringent measures and quality inspection processes to fulfill all of the mandated requirements for manufacturing, processing, and distributing a diverse variety of products globally. We deal with bulk orders, as well as private label products.

    - /* Navigation */ - nav { background: white; padding: 1rem 5%; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100; } - .logo { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: bold; color: var(--primary); } - .logo span { color: var(--accent); } - .cta-btn { background: var(--accent); color: white; padding: 0.5rem 1.2rem; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 5px; font-weight: bold; transition: 0.3s; } - .cta-btn:hover { background: #b5952f; } +
    +
    +     - /* Hero Section */ - header { background: linear-gradient(rgba(0,0,0,0.7), rgba(0,0,0,0.7)), url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1519389950473-47ba0277781c?ixlib=rb-1.2.1&auto=format&fit=crop&w=1350&q=80'); background-size: cover; background-position: center; color: white; text-align: center; padding: 8rem 2rem; } - header h1 { font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; } - header p { font-size: 1.2rem; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto 2rem; } - /* Services */ - .section { padding: 4rem 10%; text-align: center; } - .grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr)); gap: 2rem; margin-top: 2rem; } - .card { padding: 2rem; background: white; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 8px; transition: 0.3s; } - .card:hover { transform: translateY(-5px); box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border-color: var(--accent); } + + + + +
    +

    - /* Testimonials */ - .testimonial-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 2rem; } - .review { background: var(--light); padding: 1.5rem; border-left: 4px solid var(--accent); text-align: left; } - .stars { color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } - /* Footer */ - footer { background: #222; color: white; text-align: center; padding: 2rem; margin-top: auto; } + + + + + + +

    -

    Web Development & SEO from Kannauj to the World

    -

    I help Perfume Manufacturers and Global Brands build high-ranking websites that turn visitors into loyal customers.

    - Start Your Project -
    -
    -

    Hi, I'm Shahbaz Shamim

    -

    Web Developer & SEO Manager based in Kannauj, UP.

    -
    -

    Whether you are a local perfumer wanting to export globally, or an international business needing technical SEO, I bridge the gap between code and customers.

    -
    -
    -

    My Services

    -
    -
    -

    🖥️ Custom Website Dev

    -

    Fast, secure, and mobile-friendly websites built on GitHub Pages, WordPress, or Custom HTML. Perfect for showcasing products.

    -
    -
    -

    📈 SEO & Ranking

    -

    Keyword strategy to rank for terms like "Best Attar Manufacturer" or your specific niche keywords globally.

    -
    -
    -

    🛍️ E-Commerce Setup

    -

    Direct-to-consumer stores. I set up payment gateways, catalogs, and WhatsApp ordering systems.
